decisions.decision: Modular monolith (single Spring Boot app, Maven modules)
decisions.rationale: Right complexity for single-chama. Simple deploy, test, debug.

decisions.decision: Strict: modules only depend on sacco-common
decisions.rationale: Maximum isolation. Shared interfaces/DTOs in common module.
Decoupled write path. Modules publish events, ledger auto-creates journal entries.
Standardized {data, message, timestamp, path} across all endpoints.
Better for mobile clients and concurrent writes.
Auth code for users, client credentials for batch jobs.

decisions.decision: Role-based, 4 fixed roles (ADMIN, TREASURER, SECRETARY, MEMBER)

decisions.rationale: AuditEvent entity with actor, action, before/after JSON. Queryable and exportable.

decisions.decision: Configurable: reducing balance + flat rate per loan product
decisions.rationale: Maximum flexibility for different chama loan products.
Virtual threads, pattern matching, record patterns. Latest LTS.
ACID for financial data, JSON support.
Sortable, globally unique, no sequence contention.
No floating point errors for financial amounts.

constraints: Financial accuracy non-negotiable: every ledger entry must balance to zero
All money operations within database transactions
openQuestions: Chart of accounts: predefined template or fully configurable?
Which financial reports are must-have for MVP?
Merry-go-round scheduling: fixed rotation or configurable rules?

techStack.auth: Spring Authorization Server + OAuth2 Resource Server
